title: Incheon City Completes Incheon Airport Hydrogen Transportation Complex Base
content: Incheon Metropolitan City announced that it has completed the 'Incheon Airport Hydrogen Transportation Complex Base Construction Project' at the bus depot of Incheon International Airport Terminal 2 and has started full-scale operation of the liquefied hydrogen refueling station in January this year. The Incheon Airport liquefied hydrogen refueling station, which was completed this time, is a facility capable of refueling 320 kg of hydrogen per hour, and has the capacity to charge up to 200 large hydrogen buses per day. This project was carried out from January 2023 to January 2026 in collaboration between Incheon Metropolitan City, Incheon International Airlines, Korea Gas Technology Corporation, and SK Plug Hyverse, and a total of 14.29 billion won was invested, including 7 billion won in national funds, 3 billion won in municipal funds, and 4.29 billion won in private operators. This refueling station is the 16th hydrogen refueling station built in the Incheon area and the third hydrogen refueling station in the airport, and the eco-friendly transportation infrastructure has been greatly expanded by using shuttle buses and business vehicles operated by Incheon International Airlines, as well as airport limousines and cars from all over the country.
author: Analysts Account
